cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees frequently praise the collaborative, family-oriented work environment and the strong support provided by teammates.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: Staff members appreciate the company's commitment to professional development, clear advancement opportunities, and a culture that celebrates success.

cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Many employees view the compensation, healthcare benefits, and training programs as competitive and rewarding.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Some staff report significant challenges with scheduling flexibility, blackout periods for time off, and the difficulty of balancing personal life with operational demands.

cluster_summaries.label: Unsafe or Unfair Culture
cluster_summaries.summary: A subset of reviews highlights concerns regarding physical safety in extreme weather, exposure to hazardous materials, and feelings of being micromanaged.
